note: v2 contract. The root token-contract.json remains the legacy/published brand-config contract until the consumer swap.

border.input.description: Form control borders (input, select trigger, textarea).

button.fontSize.sm.description: Literal in source (text-[0.8rem]) — between xs and sm scale steps.

button.radius.description: rounded-lg = var(--radius). xs/sm sizes clamp via rounded-[min(var(--radius-md),10|12px)].

content.destructive.description: Error/destructive text and icons (components use text-destructive).

dialog.mobileInset.description: Viewport clamp: max-w-[calc(100%-2rem)] = 1rem inset per side.

focus.shadow.description: Figma kit 'Focus ring' effect style (--shadow-focus in globals.css).

font.family.mono.description: Runtime stack lives in app/globals.css (--font-sans/--font-mono via next/font).

font.family.sans.description: Runtime stack lives in app/globals.css (--font-sans/--font-mono via next/font).

font.tracking.normal.description: Figma letter-spacing in px; Tailwind's em-based tracking utilities remain authoritative at runtime.

font.tracking.tight.description: Figma letter-spacing in px; Tailwind's em-based tracking utilities remain authoritative at runtime.

font.tracking.tighter.description: Figma letter-spacing in px; Tailwind's em-based tracking utilities remain authoritative at runtime.

font.tracking.wide.description: Figma letter-spacing in px; Tailwind's em-based tracking utilities remain authoritative at runtime.

font.tracking.wider.description: Figma letter-spacing in px; Tailwind's em-based tracking utilities remain authoritative at runtime.

font.tracking.widest.description: Figma letter-spacing in px; Tailwind's em-based tracking utilities remain authoritative at runtime.

icon.size.md.description: DEFAULT — the ubiquitous size-4 chrome baseline.

icon.strokeWidth.description: lucide default. Source of truth for icons/custom/ geometry too (legacy Figma export stroke-width/Mode 1 stroke-2).

input.fontSize.md.description: Responsive in source: text-base on mobile (iOS zoom guard), md:text-sm on desktop.

interaction.disabled-opacity.description: disabled:opacity-50 — used by every interactive component.

interaction.secondary-hover-mix.description: Secondary hover mixes 5% foreground into the fill (color-mix in button.tsx).

radius.2xl.description: Static Figma-kit step. NOTE: the runtime radius scale is currently calc(var(--radius) * n) in app/globals.css; that stays authoritative until Phase 2.

radius.3xl.description: Static Figma-kit step. NOTE: the runtime radius scale is currently calc(var(--radius) * n) in app/globals.css; that stays authoritative until Phase 2.

radius.4xl.description: Static Figma-kit step. NOTE: the runtime radius scale is currently calc(var(--radius) * n) in app/globals.css; that stays authoritative until Phase 2.

radius.full.description: Static Figma-kit step. NOTE: the runtime radius scale is currently calc(var(--radius) * n) in app/globals.css; that stays authoritative until Phase 2.

radius.lg.description: Static Figma-kit step. NOTE: the runtime radius scale is currently calc(var(--radius) * n) in app/globals.css; that stays authoritative until Phase 2.

radius.md.description: Static Figma-kit step. NOTE: the runtime radius scale is currently calc(var(--radius) * n) in app/globals.css; that stays authoritative until Phase 2.

radius.none.description: Static Figma-kit step. NOTE: the runtime radius scale is currently calc(var(--radius) * n) in app/globals.css; that stays authoritative until Phase 2.

radius.sm.description: Static Figma-kit step. NOTE: the runtime radius scale is currently calc(var(--radius) * n) in app/globals.css; that stays authoritative until Phase 2.

radius.xl.description: Static Figma-kit step. NOTE: the runtime radius scale is currently calc(var(--radius) * n) in app/globals.css; that stays authoritative until Phase 2.

radius.xs.description: Static Figma-kit step. NOTE: the runtime radius scale is currently calc(var(--radius) * n) in app/globals.css; that stays authoritative until Phase 2.

select.content.radius.description: Corrected in Phase 4: source uses rounded-lg (the Phase-1 draft said rounded-md).

shadow.focus.description: Mirrors the kit's Focus ring effect.

size.control.md.description: h-8 — button/input DEFAULT, select trigger, tabs list.

size.control.sm.description: h-7 — button size sm, input size sm.

size.control.xl.description: h-10 — button/input size xl, table header row.

status.destructive.description: Alias of the live semantic token.

status.success.description: Design sign-off 2026-07-08: green-700 (green-600 on white was 3.30:1 < AA). Not consumed yet.

surface.muted.description: Subdued fills: hover states, secondary areas, skeleton base.

surface.overlay.description: Modal scrim (alert-dialog/drawer/sheet): black @ 10% paired with supports-backdrop-filter:backdrop-blur-xs. DESIGN DECISION 2026-07-08: keep this (the rendered behavior); the Figma kit's 30% `background-color` extra (color.background-color) is superseded for scrim use — it remains only as a legacy kit value. Dialog itself renders no scrim.

surface.popover.description: Floating surfaces: popover, dropdown, select content, tooltip panel.
